changes.value: In `commands.rs` `get_board_data`, `task_is_ready` is called once per task in the counting loop (line 578), and then again in the summary section (line 640-641). The second pass re-iterates all_tasks for each task. The ready/blocked counts from the first loop could be summed to avoid the second pass. #warning
get_board_data fetches all tasks twice for ready computation
